default.heading: Grid Tap Colors
default.body: Lay your phones on the ground to form a grid, then race to tap!

default.heading: Set Up the Grid
default.body: Each phone shows a number. Place them face-up in order following the pattern shown on TV.

default.heading: Speed Tap Mode
default.body: One phone lights up at a time. Tap it fast and the next phone lights immediately.

default.heading: One Player at a Time
default.body: Each player gets announced with time to get into position, then runs the full sequence on their own turn.

default.heading: Three Ways to Win
default.body: Round points go to the fastest overall time, fastest average press, and fastest single press.
